skills.name: find-olas-agent
skills.description: Discover Olas AI agents — browse the agent catalog, look up an individual agent by slug, and find the right agent for a use case (prediction markets, DeFi, automation, social).

skills.name: get-olas-metrics
skills.description: Retrieve live Olas network metrics — daily active agents, OLAS staked, transactions, agent-to-agent transactions, mech fees, and operators — and per-economy breakdowns.

skills.name: get-started-pearl
skills.description: Get started with Pearl, the self-custodial "AI Agent App Store" — download it, set up an agent on your own device, and earn potential OLAS staking rewards.

skills.name: stake-olas
skills.description: Stake OLAS and earn potential rewards by running Olas agents — via the Pearl app (consumer) or operate.olas.network (advanced), including where to find available staking contracts.
